rationale: The citing paper’s core empirical setting is a “store-within-a-store-like” partially integrated channel in department stores, and the cited paper is specifically a theory paper on when “store-within-a-store” vs. alternative channel structures are chosen. Given this direct construct/setting overlap plus a confirmed DOI reference match (10.1509/jmkr.47.4.748), the citation is plausibly foundational/theoretical rather than an obvious incidental mention.
